steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to identify the institution in which Bucky is housed. The correct answer must name the institution — not just the city, and not unrelated facts about what Bucky is or when it lived.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Bucky is the nickname of a dinosaur fossil specimen belonging to the genus Tyrannosaurus.': Identifies what Bucky is (a Tyrannosaurus fossil), but says nothing about where it is housed. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The Tyrannosaurus fossil specimen Bucky lived more than 65 million years ago, in the Late Cretaceous period.': Gives a time period, not a location or institution. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Indianapolis, Indiana, is home to a Tyrannosaurus fossil specimen nicknamed Bucky.': Names the city but not the institution. The goal is to identify the institution, not just the city. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Bucky is housed at the Children's Museum of Indianapolis in Indianapolis, Indiana.': Directly names the institution (the Children's Museum of Indianapolis) and its location. Fully accomplishes the stated goal. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
